label: plugin-inference
headline_statement: Confirmed conservative relaxed-LP inference. Define \(\widehat\tau_g=\widehat\mu_g-\widehat\mu_0\) with \(\widehat\mu_g=\sum_i\one\{D_i=d_g\}(Y_{1i}-Y_{0i})/\sum_i\one\{D_i=d_g\}\), set \(r_{g,n}=(\widehat c_{n,\alpha}\widehat s_g+\rho_n)/\sqrt n\), \(\rho_n=\log n\), and \(\widehat{\mathcal A}_{L,n}=\{\alpha:A_0\alpha=0,\ |(A_\tau\alpha)_g-\widehat\tau_g|\le r_{g,n}\ (g=1,\ldots,K),\ B_L\alpha\le d_L+\rho_n n^{-1/2}\one\}\), where \(\widehat c_{n,\alpha}\) is the Gaussian or multiplier-bootstrap \((1-\alpha)\)-critical value for the studentized CGS input vector. With \(a_h^\transpose\alpha=\sum_jq_{jh}\alpha_{jh}\), \(\widehat L_h(L)=\min_{\widehat{\mathcal A}_{L,n}}a_h^\transpose\alpha\), \(\widehat U_h(L)=\max_{\widehat{\mathcal A}_{L,n}}a_h^\transpose\alpha\), \(\widehat C_{h,n}^\star=\{\ell\in[0,\bar L]:\widehat L_h(\ell)\le0\le\widehat U_h(\ell)\}\), and \(\widehat L_h^\star=\inf\widehat C_{h,n}^\star\), Assumptions~\ref{ass:sampling-lp}--\ref{ass:frontier-contact} imply \(\Pr\{[L_h(L;P),U_h(L;P)]\subseteq[\widehat L_h(L),\widehat U_h(L)],\ \widehat{\mathcal A}_{L,n}\ne\emptyset\}\to1\) for each fixed feasible \(L\), and \(\Pr\{L_h^\star(P)\in\widehat C_{h,n}^\star\}\to1\); if Conjecture~\ref{conj:law-sharp} holds, the same endpoint interval covers the corrected law-sharp mean-completion ACRT interval \([L_h^{\mathrm{mc}}(L;P),U_h^{\mathrm{mc}}(L;P)]\) through \([L_h^{\mathrm{mc}}(L;P),U_h^{\mathrm{mc}}(L;P)]\subseteq[L_h(L;P),U_h(L;P)]\subseteq[\widehat L_h(L),\widehat U_h(L)]\).
